calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT MIKE BAUMGARDNER's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted per statement of non-opposition. Plaintiff Discover Bank has represented that it will file a request for dismissal.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
